features.name: Dark Mode Support
features.description: A sleek dark theme to reduce eye strain during late-night coding sessions.

features.name: GraphQL API Access
features.description: Provide a full GraphQL endpoint for advanced integrations and data fetching.

features.name: Webhooks Integration
features.description: Trigger external services instantly when specific events occur in your workspace.

features.name: Real-time Collaboration
features.description: Allow multiple users to edit and comment on the same board simultaneously.

features.name: SSO Authentication
features.description: Enterprise-grade security allowing users to login via Okta, Google Workspace, or Azure AD.
